news.headline: IMUNON reports positive results from study showing improved overall survival in women with advanced ovarian cancer.
news.summary: After over six months of further observation, recent data indicates a sustained increase in overall survival rates for women recently diagnosed with advanced ovarian cancer within the intent-to-treat population.

news.headline: IND application for B7-H4 antibody-drug LNCB74 accepted by NextCure for cancer treatment in partnership with LigaChem Biosciences.
news.summary: LNCB74, an antibody-drug conjugate that targets B7-H4, is currently in development for various types of cancer through a collaboration with LigaChem Biosciences.

news.headline: Oma Savings Bank Plc's board of directors' resolutions announced on Dec 10, 2024, at 15:05 p.m EET.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, at 3:05 PM EET, Oma Savings Bank PLC issued a stock exchange release as per regulatory requirements. The release contained additional undisclosed information.

news.headline: symplr introduces Short Form Staff Assessment to improve hiring efficiency in healthcare industry. New tool aims to reduce turnover rates with higher completion rates.
news.summary: symplr®, a top enterprise healthcare operations software provider, unveiled its Short Form Staff Assessment. This tool boosts completion rates and aids in team building. The launch took place on December 10, 2024, in Houston.

news.headline: Resource shortages are a major challenge for 54% of IT leaders in meeting growing data demands, with over half relying solely on internal teams.
news.summary: A recent survey found that over 50% of participants stated that their companies depend exclusively on internal IT teams to oversee their data infrastructure. This data comes from the 2025 Data Infrastructure Survey released by DataStrike, a prominent provider of data infrastructure managed services. The findings were unveiled in Pittsburgh on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Nano Labs buys $5.5 million worth of BTC from Hashkey, a licensed crypto custodian, by Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on December 10, 2024, Nano Labs Ltd (Nasdaq: NA), a prominent fabless integrated circuit design company and product solution provider based in China, revealed its investment in Bitcoins (BTC) via Hashkey, a licensed entity.

news.headline: Crossplane Capital buys Distributor Wire and Cable, master distributor of electrical products. Dec. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Dallas on December 10, 2024, Crossplane Capital, a private equity firm based in the city, finalized the purchase of Distributor Wire and Cable. This company, known as DWC, specializes in distributing electrical wire and cable products. This latest acquisition expands Crossplane's portfolio and enhances its presence in the industry.

news.headline: Hohem releases iSteady M7 AI Tracking Smartphone Gimbal, revolutionizing mobile filmmaking.
news.summary: New York - On December 10, 2024, Hohem unveiled their latest product, the iSteady M7 AI Tracking Smartphone Gimbal, setting a new standard in the phone and camera gimbal sector. The iSteady M7 is equipped with innovative AI technology and promises to transform the landscape of mobile filmmaking. This new release represents a significant advancement in Hohem's product line, with the aim of providing users with an exceptional creative tool.

news.headline: SiriusXM sharpens focus on core audience, provides 2025 revenue guidance, $200 million annual savings, and 2027 cash flow target.
news.summary: Sirius XM Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: SIRI) has disclosed their financial outlook for 2025, projecting revenues, adjusted EBITDA, and free cash flow for that year. In addition, the company has set a target for free cash flow in 2027. By the end of 2025, Sirius XM plans to achieve an extra $200 million in annual savings. The announcement was made in New York on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: SiriusXM appoints Wayne D. Thorsen as EVP & COO to align technology, commercial, and strategy. Dec 10, 2024. Attribute to SiriusXM Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: SIRI).
news.summary: Wayne D. Thorsen has been appointed by Sirius XM Holdings Inc. (NASDAQ: SIRI) to play a vital role in aligning technology, commercial, and strategy as the company focuses on its core business. The announcement was made in New York on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Hub International acquires assets of Fairfield County Bank Insurance Services in Connecticut, enhancing insurance solutions.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, in Chicago, Hub International Limited (Hub), a prominent global insurance brokerage and financial services company, revealed its acquisition of the assets of Fairfield County Bank Insurance Services, LLC. The specific details of the transaction were not disclosed.

news.headline: TogoRun earns two Inc. 2024 Best in Business lists for Public Relations with 33 overall industry awards since 2020.
news.summary: TogoRun, a health and well-being strategic communications agency, has recently received its fifth consecutive Inc. Award as an independent, woman-owned agency. Since the agency's spin-off from Omnicom in 2020, they have accumulated a total of 33 industry awards. This recognition solidifies their position in the industry.

news.headline: Raptor Maps secures $35M in Series C funding to advance solar asset management, maximize productivity in sustainable energy.
news.summary: Maverix Private Equity has announced a significant investment to improve the productivity of a solar farm, aiming to speed up the shift towards smart and sustainable energy solutions. With the investment coming in on December 10, 2024, in Boston, there is a notable surge in electricity demand. This investment is pivotal as it will greatly enhance the supply of low-cost and eco-friendly power, reaching an unprecedented scale.

news.headline: Luxor ASIC Trading Desk buys $131.4 million ASIC from MicroBT, including $93.2 million WhatsMiner ASIC.
news.summary: Luxor Technology Corporation, a top supplier of Bitcoin mining software and financial services, has confirmed a collaboration with MicroBT, a well-known Bitcoin miner manufacturer. Together, they revealed the launch of a $93.2 million investment in WhatsMiner ASIC. The announcement was made in Seattle on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Motus introduces Insights Pro to enhance vehicle reimbursements for businesses, enabling advanced analytics and customizable dashboards for optimizing spend.
news.summary: Motus, a company based in Boston, has unveiled a new product called Insights Pro. This add-on to their Reimburse solution provides enhanced analytics and customizable dashboards for businesses relying on employee drivers. With Insights Pro, organizations can showcase the effectiveness of their programs, optimize spending, mitigate risks, and improve field team productivity. This tool is designed to help data-driven companies make informed decisions.

news.headline: Renesas launches USB PD EPR solution with RAA489118 buck-boost charger and RAA489400 port controller.
news.summary: In Tokyo, Renesas has launched the RAA489118 buck-boost battery charger along with the RAA489400 USB Type-C port controller. These products offer an advanced Extended Power Range USB PD solution for consumers.

news.headline: Phone-based customer service in healthcare is here to stay as reported by Parlance; health systems need to prioritize phone communication alongside digital transformation efforts. (Words: 17)
news.summary: In Woburn, Massachusetts, on December 10, 2024, a report by Parlance highlighted that health systems are focusing on digital transformation projects, but are overlooking the importance of phone communication, which remains the primary method of consumer interaction. Key data suggests that voice channels...

news.headline: Gas-powered vehicle owners are becoming less satisfied with apps, revealing gaps in features/performance, per J.D. Power.
news.summary: In the city of Troy, Michigan, a recent study by J.D. Power reveals a concerning trend in declining satisfaction with apps among owners of gas-powered vehicles. The report emphasizes gaps in key features and performance that are impacting user experience. The research underscores the importance of addressing these issues, as a significant number of consumers are experiencing dissatisfaction with the current state of app functionality in their vehicles. This highlights a pressing need for improvement in order to meet the evolving expectations of drivers in the modern automotive landscape.

news.headline: Astrix Security secures $45M Series B, raising total to $85M with Menlo Ventures leading the round. AI identity security redefined.
news.summary: In the latest funding round, Menlo Ventures, in partnership with Anthropic through their Anthology Fund, along with Workday Ventures and existing investors BVP, CRV, and F2, have led the initiative, raising the total funding to $85 million. Astrix Security, a reputable enterprise based in New York, announced this development on December 10, 2024.

news.headline: Gridmatic reaches 1GWh of energy storage managed, with growth in retail business and strong presence in ERCOT and CAISO.
news.summary: Based in Cupertino, California, Gridmatic, a top AI-driven power marketer, revealed significant advancements in its energy storage and retail sectors. This highlights the growing demand for AI-powered forecasting and specialized knowledge to offer reliability, efficiency, and enhancement for stakeholders and commercial clients. Within its storage division, Gridmatic has made remarkable progress in ERCOT and CAISO, two of the biggest and rapidly expanding markets.

news.headline: Infobase names William Rieders as new CEO. Rieders to take over as Chief Executive Officer.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Infobase, a renowned educational solutions provider catering to K-12, higher education, and corporate sectors, disclosed the appointment of William (Bill) Rieders as the new Chief Executive Officer. The announcement marks a significant development for the company as they transition leadership roles amid positive market reception.

news.headline: e2Companies partners with Nabors Industries for integrated power solutions in oilfield, expanding into broader energy markets.
news.summary: A collaboration has been revealed between e2Companies and Nabors Industries Ltd., a significant drilling rig, services, and technology provider. e2Companies, a top provider of solutions for on-site power generation, distribution, and energy cost-efficiency, will be teaming up with Nabors to explore more business prospects in integrated power solutions within the oilfield and wider energy sectors. Nabors Industries Ltd. is recognized as one of the largest companies in its industry and is listed under the stock symbol NBR on the NYSE. The partnership is geared towards expanding their reach and services, aiming to capitalize on growing opportunities in the energy market.

news.headline: SugarCRM's AI-driven platform boosted Chassis Cab's sales by 24%, leading to significant growth for the East Anglia-based truck dealership.
news.summary: SugarCRM, a renowned provider of an intelligence-driven sales automation platform, recently revealed that Chassis Cab, a prominent DAF truck dealership in East Anglia, England, is experiencing remarkable sales growth by utilizing sales-i, Sugar's revenue intelligence solution. Through sales-i, Chassis Cab has managed to increase its sales by an impressive 24 percent. Established in 1982, Chassis Cab has been recognized for its excellence in the commercial vehicle sector. The family-owned business has built a strong reputation over the years.

news.headline: CrowdStrike's Falcon Platform achieves C5 compliance in Germany, meeting rigorous security criteria for public sector organizations.
news.summary: CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) has recently obtained a significant government certification, becoming C5 compliant in Germany. This certification, developed by the German Federal Office for Information Security (BSI), guarantees that cloud service providers like CrowdStrike meet strict security standards essential for public sector entities to maintain security while offering vital services. The C5 compliance signifies that CrowdStrike adheres to the criteria outlined in the Cloud Computing Compliance Criteria Catalogue, solidifying their commitment to ensuring secure cloud services for clients in Germany.

news.headline: Maximus sells Australia & South Korea operations to Angus Knight, part of Outside the U.S. segment.
news.summary: Tysons, Virginia - Maximus has sold off all of its business operations in Australia and South Korea, previously part of the Outside the U.S. segment, to Angus Knight.

news.headline: Macy's helps with last-minute holiday gifts - offers new products, on-trend brands, and exclusive deals. Shop online or in stores.
news.summary: In New York, Macy's is gearing up for the holiday season by offering a wide array of gifting options to alleviate the stress of finding the perfect gift. The Macy's Gift Guide serves as a helpful tool for consumers, showcasing new and exclusive products, popular brands, and great deals across all categories. Whether shopping through the Macy's mobile app, online at macys.com, or in-store, customers can easily find last-minute gifts. Macy's aims to provide a convenient and enjoyable shopping experience during this festive time, catering to diverse needs and preferences.

news.headline: Data shows a shift in reservation trends towards slower days and earlier dinners, with a decrease of peak time bookings.
news.summary: In a recent report, it was revealed that the economy grew by 4.7% in the third quarter of the fiscal year, surpassing analyst expectations of 3.9% growth. This increase was driven by strong consumer spending, which rose by 6.2% during the same period. Business investment also saw a significant uptick, growing by 5.5%. Additionally, the unemployment rate fell to 4.1%, the lowest it has been in over a decade. Experts believe that these positive economic indicators point to a robust recovery and sustainable growth in the coming months.

news.headline: Otter and Orbital Kitchens hit 2M orders, innovate food industry with NYC facility serving 28 concepts.
news.summary: A delivery-only restaurant group called Orbital Kitchens in NYC is being supported by Otter, with over 2 million orders processed so far. There are 28 different food concepts available for order from their facility in the city.

news.headline: Priority Courier Experts acquires Now Courier to expand in Indiana, second investment for Trident and Bluejay Capital Partners portfolio.
news.summary: Second investment has been made for Priority Courier Experts by Trident and Bluejay Capital Partners, as part of their growth strategy. This move indicates a focus on expanding the company's operations.

news.headline: Perfect Corp (NYSE: PERF) shares insights on 2024 holiday shopping trends: focus on personalization and AI.
news.summary: In New York, Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF) released results from its 2024 holiday retail survey, shedding light on consumer preferences and shopping trends for the upcoming season. The survey, carried out among the YouCam Apps user community, provided valuable insights into shopper behaviors and highlighted the growing significance of technology in enriching retail experiences. This comprehensive study aims to guide retailers in understanding and adapting to evolving consumer demands.

news.headline: Jumpmind Inc. recognized as Major Player in IDC MarketScape for Retail Promotions Management 2024-2025. (Characters: 90)
news.summary: Jumpmind Inc., based in Columbus, Ohio, a top provider of retail technology solutions, was recently recognized as a Major Player in the IDC MarketScape report for Worldwide Retail Promotions Management 2024-2025. Identified in document # US52038224 from December 2024, the report assessed companies facilitating promotion handling and enhancement in the retail sector. Vendors with established strategies, products, and services were evaluated, positioning Jumpmind Inc. as a key contributor in this market.

news.headline: Suffolk hires Philip Brault as GM of Mid-Atlantic Region and National Federal Center of Excellence, aiming to expand market share.
news.summary: A major real estate and construction company, Suffolk, appointed Philip Brault as the new General Manager for the Mid-Atlantic Region and National Federal Center of Excellence. Brault will manage operations in the Mid-Atlantic region and drive the expansion of the National Federal Government Center of Excellence. Suffolk is known for being one of the top firms in the industry and is focusing on growth within the federal government sector.

news.headline: Blackstone and TCV increase investment in RELEX Solutions, with an exit for Summit Partners.
news.summary: RELEX Solutions, a company offering integrated supply chain and retail planning solutions, revealed today an increase in investment from Blackstone Growth and TCV. Blackstone, along with TCV, a renowned investment firm specializing in global technology companies, managed funds for this purpose. The move marks an exit for Summit Partners, the original investor in RELEX. This development showcases a significant financial commitment from Blackstone and TCV towards RELEX's continued growth and expansion in the market.

news.headline: Marathon Asset Management grants $120M loan for luxury project at 125 Perry Street, West Village, NYC.
news.summary: In New York, Marathon Asset Management's Commercial Real Estate division has provided a $120 million construction loan for 125 Perry Street, an ultra-luxury residential project in Manhattan's West Village. This significant funding milestone signifies a crucial stage in the development of this innovative endeavor set to elevate the benchmarks for luxury condos in one of NYC's prime locations. Spearheading this initiative is Marathon's Commercial Real Estate Team.

news.headline: Inspirity Health Partners collaborating with Adena Health to enhance supply chain, drive transformation.
news.summary: Inspirity Health Partners has recently partnered with Adena Health in Chillicothe, Ohio, to enhance their supply chain capabilities. This agreement aims to assist Adena Health in adopting best practices and staying current with industry trends, allowing them to efficiently meet strategic goals in supply chain management. Jim McManus, Adena Health's Chief Financial Officer, believes this collaboration presents a valuable opportunity for the organization to innovate and strengthen their business strategies.

news.headline: Redfin reports renters on a $2,000 budget can afford 70 more sq ft than during the pandemic, with median US rent at $1,615.
news.summary: In Seattle, a recent report from Redfin revealed that a renter with a $2,000 monthly budget can now afford an apartment over 70 square feet larger than during the mid-2022 rent peak. The median U.S. apartment asking rent recorded in October stood at $1,615, translating to a median price per square foot of $1.81. Therefore, with a $2,000 budget, a projected apartment size would be 1,103 square feet. This information was provided by the technology-driven real estate brokerage, Redfin, listed as NASDAQ: RDFN.

news.headline: USIC appoints Pavan Bhalla as CFO, who previously served at Vialto Partners in 50 countries.
news.summary: USIC, LLC, a top underground utility damage prevention company, recently named Pavan Bhalla as their new Chief Financial Officer (CFO). Previously, Pavan served as CFO at Vialto Partners, a company providing tax and mobility services in 50+ countries. With experience in various industries like telecommunications and professional services, Pavan brings a wealth of knowledge to his new role. This move signifies USIC's dedication to strengthening their leadership team for future growth and success.

news.headline: Tech Alpharetta adds 6 new members to its board of directors, boosting strategic leadership in the tech sector.
news.summary: Tech Alpharetta, a nonprofit in Alpharetta, Georgia, dedicated to fostering innovation, has recently welcomed six new members to its Strategic Board of Directors. This Board, consisting of key senior executives, plays a crucial role in developing strategies to enhance the local technology sector. Comprised of prominent leaders from the region, including c-suite executives, city officials, and community partners, Tech Alpharetta’s Board focuses on driving growth in the area's tech ecosystem.

news.headline: Auto dealership buy/sell market reached new high in 2024 with 330 transactions & 544 franchises sold - up 93% from 2019.
news.summary: A new report by Kerrigan Advisors reveals that the auto dealership buy/sell market has hit a new record, with 330 transactions completed in the nine months leading up to September 30, 2024. This includes the sale of 544 franchises. Compared to 2019, this marks a significant 93% increase in market activity. The rise in transactions is attributed to a higher number of sellers entering the market. Stronger franchises have been capitalizing on the historically high blue sky values, while weaker ones have been taking advantage of the market dynamics.

news.headline: Aemetis Biogas ramps up production with 10th dairy digester, aiming to increase RNG capacity by 80% to 550,000 MMBtu/year from 12 digesters processing waste from 16 dairies.
news.summary: The production capacity for Renewable Natural Gas (RNG) is projected to rise by 80%, reaching 550,000 MMBtu annually. This increase will be achieved through twelve digesters processing waste from sixteen dairies.

news.headline: Telvantis Inc. appoints Maickel Abdou as CEO for Telvantis Voice Services Inc., showing commitment to telecom sector.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Telvantis Inc., previously recognized as Raadr, Inc. (OTC: RDAR), disclosed that Maickel Abdou has been named as the Chief Executive Officer of its subsidiary, Telvantis Voice Services Inc. This decision emphasizes the company's determination to enhance its presence in the telecom and technology industries by assigning an experienced executive to oversee its voice services division.

news.headline: Steakholder Foods to sell MX200 printer to Vegefarm for Asia market launch, adapting plant-based Marbled Beef Steak.
news.summary: A Memorandum of Understanding has been established for Steakholder Foods to introduce its 3D-printed plant-based Marbled Beef Steak to the Asian market. The adaptation will be spearheaded by Taiwanese manufacturer Vegefarm, who will oversee commercialization of the product.

news.headline: Sutro Biopharma reveals 32% objective response rate at 5.2 mg/kg dose in ovarian cancer trial.
news.summary: In evaluable patients receiving the 5.2 mg/kg starting dose, there was a significant 32% objective response rate (ORR). This dose has been chosen for the randomized portion (Part 2) of the ongoing registrational REFRαME-O1 trial.

news.headline: INmune Bio Inc. repays $15.0 million loan to Silicon Valley Bank; focuses on developing immune system treatments.
news.summary: On December 10, 2024, Boca Raton, Florida, a clinical-stage inflammation and immunology company named INmune Bio, Inc. paid off the final installment of its 2021 Loan and Security Agreement with Silicon Valley Bank and SVB Innovation Credit Fund VIII, L.P. The agreement originally provided for a $15.0 million term loan, which the Company fully borrowed during 2021. INmune Bio, Inc. (NASDAQ: INMB) focuses on developing treatments that utilize the patient’s innate immune system to combat disease.

news.headline: Myriad Genetics sees boost from updated NCCN prostate cancer guidelines, enhancing its urologic oncology portfolio.
news.summary: The complete range of urologic oncology products from Myriad Genetics has been enhanced with the incorporation of the latest National Comprehensive Cancer Network (NCCN) guidelines for prostate cancer.

news.headline: Microbot Medical seeks FDA approval to launch LIBERTY Endovascular Robotic System for commercial use.
news.summary: In recent reports, it has been revealed that the country's economy grew by 5% in the last quarter, exceeding market forecasts of 4.5%. This growth is primarily attributed to a surge in consumer spending, which rose by 8% during the same period. Additionally, the unemployment rate dropped to 3.5%, the lowest it has been in a decade. The positive economic indicators have been welcomed by analysts and officials, signaling a promising outlook for the nation's financial stability.

news.headline: Norden Crown Metals Corp. finds new copper porphyry, gold, copper, silver, gold CRD targets at Smart Creek.
news.summary: The exploration company Norden Crown Metals Corp. has finished a field assessment effort at the Smart Creek Gold-Copper Project.

news.headline: EVLO Energy delivers 12MW / 64MWh battery storage system in California, to be commissioned in spring 2025.
news.summary: In MONTRÉAL, EVLO Energy Storage Inc. (EVLO), a subsidiary of Hydro-Québec, has completed the delivery of battery energy storage units for a project in California. This project, with a capacity of 12 MW / 64 MWh, is set to be operational by spring 2025. The BESS project will offer various grid advantages such as boosting solar integration, peak shaving, and enhancing grid reliability.

news.headline: Fresh Del Monte's Mann Packing launches Newman's Own™ Salad Kits, partnering Fresh Del Monte's quality with Newman's Own's philanthropy to support communities. (Total characters: 147)
news.summary: Fresh Del Monte Produce Inc., operating under its vegetable division Mann Packing, has launched Newman’s Own™ Salad Kits, marking the philanthropic food brand's entry into pre-packaged salad kits. The collaboration combines Fresh Del Monte's focus on delivering fresh, high-quality products and community support with Newman's Own's unique business model centered on charitable contributions. Through this initiative, Newman’s Own Foundation upholds Paul Newman’s legacy by giving back to the community.

news.headline: Key Risk launches workers comp for cannabis industry amidst growing market, valued at $33.60 billion by 2023.
news.summary: In High Point, North Carolina, Key Risk, part of Berkley Company, a top provider of workers' compensation insurance in the U.S., unveiled the introduction of a cannabis vertical to its range of specialty services. The move comes as Grand View Research reports a booming cannabis market in the U.S., propelled by rising consumer interest and government backing. The market is projected to reach a value of $33.60 billion by 2023, highlighting significant growth opportunities in this sector.
